title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CORON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORON, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO CLAUDIO SANDOVAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2761 / 55 OG No. 40, 8439 (October 5, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2586, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CORON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORON, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO CLAUDIO SANDOVAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Coron Elementary School in the Municipality of Coron, Province of Palawan, is changed to Claudio Sandoval Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
